title: L6 Handoff Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter for grimoires/loa/handoffs/<date>-<from>-<to>-<topic>.md per SDD §5.8.2 + cycle-098 Sprint 6. handoff_id is auto-generated content-addressable (SHA-256 of canonical JSON of {schema_version, from, to, topic, ts_utc, references, tags, body}). Slug-shape constraints on from/to/topic enforce filesystem-safe path components (no traversal).

handoff_id.description: Auto-generated if absent; if supplied, MUST equal the lib-computed value or write fails (FR-L6-6 content-addressable invariant).

from.description: Operator slug. Verified against OPERATORS.md when verify_operators=true (FR-L6 + IMP-004).

topic.description: Slug-shape topic; used as filename component. No dots, slashes, or whitespace — caller pre-slugifies.

ts_utc.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp with explicit Z suffix. Bounds-checked at write-time (lib rejects timestamps outside [epoch, now+24h]).

references.description: Free-form references (issue URLs, commit refs, file paths). Preserved verbatim per FR-L6-7 — lib does NOT canonicalize/normalize entries.
